name: Kindergarten Metalwork & Jewelry — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for metal objects, patterns, and safe soft-material jewelry design. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with metal objects, patterns, and safe soft-material jewelry design.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about metal objects, patterns, and safe soft-material jewelry design through a close look at metal objects, patterns, and safe soft-material jewelry design.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about metal objects, patterns, and safe soft-material jewelry design through a guided practice with metal objects, patterns, and safe soft-material jewelry design.
